1.text: You don't need training to save someone's life.

2.text: You just need the courage to ask.

3.text: Most people don't ask, because they're afraid of saying the wrong thing.

4.text: But silence is scarier than the wrong words.

5.text: So we built a guide for people who care enough to ask anyway.

6.text: How to start the conversation. How to stay in it when it gets hard. And what to do next.

7.text: Created by a licensed clinical social worker and loss survivor. Real talk. No jargon. Just what actually helps.

8.text: Take the free quiz. Link in bio.
